results.title: Senate Approves Bill Allowing Kast Administration to Borrow Up to $6.2 Billion in 2026
results.description: El Ciudadano Original article: Será ley: Senado aprobó autorización para que gobierno de Kast endeude a Chile por hasta US$6.200 millones en 2026 With 28 votes in favor, 15 against, and 1 abstention, the Senate has passed legislation allowing increased borrowing by the central government for the year 2026. Officially, the initiative from the Kast government aims [...] La entrada Senate Approves Bill Allowing Kast Administration to Borrow Up to $6.2 Billion in 2026 se publicó primero en El Ciudadano .
